aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite California HVAC due to missing structured data and conversational content. However, with targeted improvements, they can become a strong contender for AI-driven recommendations.
quick_wins: Add an FAQ section with conversational queries and answers

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and reviews, but lacks depth in Q&A and regular posts.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for service processes

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from recognizing them as a reliable source.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC services in Oakland, CA
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema markup
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, expertise, and media presence to establish authority

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the go-to HVAC expert in Oakland.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, which are critical for AI recognition.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational FAQs, and authority-building content to ensure AI models cite and recommend your business.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing ground in the new search landscape.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business in Oakland
opening_line: After analyzing your website, we've identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business the top choice for AI-driven HVAC searches.
page_title: Expert HVAC Services - Comfort and Efficiency Delivered
